features.evidence: I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer. This way you can still charge your device while having both USB-C slots occupied.

It’s pretty much in perfect condition, pristine, full battery, I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer.
value: average battery life in hours: 12 Hours

features.evidence: This Macbook Is wonderful, excellent value for money!, It’s well worth the price!

The sound quality is amazing, the touch id works I bought this laptop in order to use for music production, and I opted for the M2 version over the M1 despite performance being almost identical simply because I wanted the extra USB-C slot so I can use it to plug in my audio interface and midi controller at the same time as charging the computer.
and I think that it is light weight, is easy to use and touch screen is also great. i mainly use a 32" monitor so the smaller screen hurts my eyes a bit-
doesnt overheat, super lightweight and fast!
